无女主（比较喜欢无女主的[飞吻]）有刀（还很大）无明显毒点可放心食用[饱了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714842356,"group_id":"7246086187910171707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿 前程似锦，福海如渊！
另 希望我追的书都不断更不烂尾（谢谢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8sg0BqNHse6O178Af7fzDzGF0nelrtMyyXhLBtTKxht","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/691427230ecf43ebad94199c7234f12d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705927&x-signature=KlIcQTYIfh1KV1wwVdGmvqRm%2BFY%3D","user_id":"2859205777960541","user_name":"枫也七"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2859205777960541","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246086187910171707","book_info":{"abstract":"【磕CP】【前期偏黑搞事刀人不眨眼】【后期偏好人走温馨日常微刀】【男同味预警】
【乐子浓度偏低警告】【书圈里同人文和同人图超级多！快来炫一口！】
渡边一陇身带乐子人系统，搞事就能变强，准备狠狠坑一波黑绝。
对千手柱间，“羸弱千手，不及黑绝大人分毫！”
对宇智波斑，“小小宇智波，也敢和黑绝大人比拼舞姿？”
对晓组织，“就这？地爆天星不配给我家黑绝大人挠痒！”
……
黑绝（懵逼中）：一觉醒来，我竟与全世界为敌？！
这忍界到底是谁在赢啊？为什么我的计划总会被莫名其妙地破坏？！

tem_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220247282B6BEF4E50A5F509B173"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":37201,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50793,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5695},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1716045431,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7326238759535117119","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常厉害的文了，本来是抱着看无脑爽文进来的，但是完全颠覆了我的认知，前期没一个伏笔是白埋的，后面人物越来越饱满，而且文笔很好，特别流畅的，我不喜欢等慢慢更新所以完结后熬夜看完的，一整个状态就是老奶奶得道成仙:咿好！我成了！真的宝藏好文，NND，根本不够看，看完就是一整个意犹未尽啊，后劲太大，而且主角的马甲都很吊，刀的话，是有点难受的但是他也爽啊，主打就是一个痛并快乐着！兄弟们不看就是亏了，这本同人真滴好啊！力求作者再写点后续吧，非常不错的文！！！(尽管名字离谱了点但是真的快乐啊！)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705774745,"group_id":"7246086187910171707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这家伙很懒什么也没有说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ikl2fzdOw7cdNdg5XaivQjB9jK0cWuy4ZrWg9Sl8vY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c20bd1c861ef4d9cbcdcffbae837af01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704763&x-signature=UBgPTF9eK8BeWmyJ%2BpY3rBt2uh4%3D","user_id":"1594736831640714","user_name":"涑竹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1594736831640714","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\" 渡边一陇身带乐子人系统，搞事就能变强，准备狠狠坑一波黑绝。
对千手柱间，“羸弱千手，不及黑绝大人分毫！”
对宇智波斑，“小小宇智波，也敢和黑绝大人比拼舞姿？”
对晓组织，“就这？地爆天星不配给我家黑绝大人挠痒！”
……
黑绝（懵逼中）：一觉醒来，我竟与全世界为敌？！
这忍界到底是谁在赢啊？为什么我的计划总会被莫名其妙地破坏？！

tem_cnt":"297"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220247282B6BEF4E50A5F509B173"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":61457,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10723},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1705904782,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7391843740380971801","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完的第二天屁颠屁颠跑来写书评了。

丑话说在前头但仅代表个人观点：其实到后面感觉套路有点僵化了，完全能猜到。结局的话我感觉还蛮仓促的，我还以为会打个天崩地裂（）但是没想到就这样，那样，然后就平平淡淡的结束了，虽然后面大团圆也很棒就是啦。

但是这本书显而易见的是题材很新颖，至少你在番茄找不到同类型的。
而且作者文笔、逻辑双在线，人物性格的刻画也是比较传神的，所以代入感还是挺强的。
如果你认真看的话其实可以发现作者很喜欢埋伏笔，包括像是主角心态上的转变，作者都会有意无意的提一下，后期的变化就不会过于突兀。
再加上本身“乐子人”的设定，所以剧情其实一直在反转，反转，再反转，不用担心过于平淡。

总而言之看了不亏，就怕走过这个村就没这个店了啊，强烈推荐真的。
顺带提一嘴：其实这个作者是我见过最活跃的了（？）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721050003,"group_id":"7246086187910171707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我真的好脆弱呜呜呜求求你们别骂我可以吗呜呜呜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6q9Z4G0sVmHZhHyOPriAGc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1101eba3629b4d1eb84bc87693a85b8a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705585&x-signature=P5gE%2BTwj5hA0LCMwhCMjASjK%2BsI%3D","user_id":"110566141050","user_name":"Que羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110566141050","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246086187910171707","book_info":{"abstract":"【磕CP】【前期偏黑搞事刀人不眨眼】【后期偏好人走温馨日常微刀】【男同味预警】
